Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team a single enriched report that shows exactly where every backordered part stands, with dead-end items clearly flagged so no customer is left waiting on a part that can't be sourced.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder situations, giving the team ready-to-send updates for affected orders.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates manual drafting of repetitive customer status emails and ensures customers get timely, consistent communication without relying on individuals to remember to follow up.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor listings with make, model, year, and part fitment data.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Captures a comprehensive market view of two-piece rotor availability across three major suppliers in one pass, replacing what would otherwise be hours of manual catalog browsing.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which vehicles are already covered and which represent gaps or opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has competitive coverage and where there is unmet demand, giving Dino a clear product gap analysis without manual comparison work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers to gather demand signals for two-piece rotor fitments where DFC currently has gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand data from actual customers to inform sourcing decisions, turning a catalog gap into a validated business opportunity without manual outreach campaigns.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one clean, actionable document that consolidates market data, inventory gaps, and customer demand — ready to drive sourcing and product decisions immediately.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, primary text, and descriptions — across every live campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility into all running ad content in one pull, making it possible to audit at scale instead of manually opening ads one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of pulled ad copy for the specified target phrases and identifies the exact ad, field, and matched text for each instance found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across potentially hundreds of ads in seconds, delivering precision that manual review cannot match at speed or scale.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured report listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, immediately actionable compliance or quality report to the right person without requiring them to run or interpret the scan themselves.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape, with 28 of 55 total agents completed, 9 currently in progress, and 18 more in the planned queue. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, the momentum behind our in-progress builds — including the R1 Customer Agent, Amazon Ads AI, and the Friction Friday video production tool — continues to move us closer to an even more powerful automation stack. Great work from everyone keeping these projects on track!
